allow: Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Process -Name ''PhoneExperienceHost'',''YourPhone'',''PhoneLink'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Host ''Phone Link processes stopped''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''ls /home/*/identity-core-api/ 2>/dev/null || ls /opt/fivucsas/ 2>/dev/null || find / -name docker-compose.yml -path ""*identity*"" 2>/dev/null | head -5''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''whoami && pwd && ls -la ~/identity-core-api/app.jar''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''cp /tmp/identity-core-api-1.0.0-MVP.jar ~/identity-core-api/app.jar && cd ~/identity-core-api && docker compose down && docker compose up -d --build''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''curl -s http://localhost:8080/actuator/health || docker logs fivucsas-identity-core-api --tail 20''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''docker logs fivucsas-identity-core-api --tail 10''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''docker logs fivucsas-identity-core-api 2>&1 | grep -A5 ""Flyway\\|migration\\|Validate""''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''docker logs fivucsas-identity-core-api --tail 30''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''curl -sf http://localhost:8080/actuator/health && echo OK || docker logs fivucsas-identity-core-api --tail 5''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''docker logs fivucsas-identity-core-api --tail 5 2>&1''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''docker exec fivucsas-postgres psql -U fivucsas -d fivucsas -c ""SELECT installed_rank, version, description, checksum, success FROM flyway_schema_history ORDER BY installed_rank DESC LIMIT 5;""''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''docker exec fivucsas-postgres psql -U fivucsas -d fivucsas -t -c ""SELECT version,success FROM flyway_schema_history ORDER BY installed_rank""''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''docker exec fivucsas-postgres psql -U fivucsas -d fivucsas -l''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''docker exec fivucsas-postgres psql -U postgres -l''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''source ~/identity-core-api/.env && docker exec fivucsas-postgres psql -U $DB_USERNAME -d $DB_NAME -c ""DELETE FROM flyway_schema_history WHERE success=false;""''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''docker logs fivucsas-identity-core-api --tail 5''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''docker logs fivucsas-identity-core-api --tail 30 2>&1 | head -20''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''docker logs fivucsas-identity-core-api --tail 3''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''curl -s http://localhost:8080/actuator/health || docker logs fivucsas-identity-core-api --tail 3''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''docker logs fivucsas-identity-core-api 2>&1 | tail -40''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''cp /tmp/identity-core-api-1.0.0-MVP.jar /home/ahabg/identity-core-api/app.jar && cd /home/ahabg/identity-core-api && docker compose up -d --build identity-core-api''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "gcloud compute ssh fivucsas-identity-core --zone=europe-central2-a --tunnel-through-iap --project=fivucsas --command=''docker logs fivucsas-identity-core-api 2>&1 | grep -i error | head -5''")
